memberdef.type: bool(*)(uint32_t offset, const uint8_t *data, size_t len, void *ctx)
memberdef.definition: using umidi::protocol::FlashWriteCallback = bool (*)(uint32_t offset, const uint8_t* data, size_t len, void* ctx)
memberdef.name: FlashWriteCallback

briefdescription.para: Flash write callback for firmware updates.

memberdef.type: bool(*)(const uint8_t *data, size_t len, const uint8_t *signature, void *ctx)

memberdef.name: SignatureVerifyCallback

memberdef.definition: using umidi::protocol::StdinCallback = void (*)(const uint8_t* data, size_t len, void* ctx)
memberdef.name: StdinCallback

memberdef.type: void(*)(const uint8_t *key, size_t key_len, const uint8_t *data, size_t data_len, uint8_t *out)
memberdef.name: HmacSha256Fn

memberdef.definition: using umidi::protocol::RandomFn = void (*)(uint8_t* out, size_t len)
memberdef.name: RandomFn

memberdef.type: bool(*)(const uint8_t *public_key, const uint8_t *message, size_t message_len, const uint8_t *signature)

memberdef.name: Sha256Fn

memberdef.definition: using umidi::protocol::Crc32Fn = uint32_t (*)(const uint8_t* data, size_t len)
memberdef.name: Crc32Fn

memberdef.definition: using umidi::protocol::ProgressCallback = void (*)(uint32_t received, uint32_t total, void* user_data)
memberdef.name: ProgressCallback

briefdescription.para: UMI SysEx ID (placeholder - should register official MIDI ID)
Magic number for UMI firmware images.
Timeout configuration for slow connections (MIDI over USB)
Default flow control configuration (conservative, works on slow links)
High-throughput flow control (for fast USB MIDI)

parameterdescription.para: Output buffer (must be at least encoded_size(in_len))

briefdescription.para: Calculate encoded size for given input length.
Calculate decoded size for given encoded length.

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t *a, const uint8_t *b, size_t len) noexcept
memberdef.name: secure_compare

briefdescription.para: Constant-time comparison to prevent timing attacks.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t major1, uint32_t minor1, uint32_t patch1, uint32_t major2, uint32_t minor2, uint32_t patch2) noexcept
memberdef.name: compare_versions

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t major, uint8_t minor, uint8_t patch) noexcept
memberdef.name: pack_version
